item.title: Combined acetaldehyde metabolism burden modifies IBD susceptibility to alcohol consumption.
item.description: Gut - The effect of alcohol consumption on IBD remains inconclusive, potentially due to the overlooked role of alcohol metabolism. We aimed to investigate the potential modifying role of alcohol metaboli...

item.title: Faroese whole genomes provide insight into ancestry and recent selection.
item.description: eLife - The Faroe Islands are home to descendants of a North Atlantic founder population with a unique history shaped by both migration and periods of relative isolation. Here, we investigate the genetic d...

item.title: Single-cell RNA sequencing of terminal ileal biopsies identifies signatures of Crohn's disease pathogenesis.
item.description: Nature genetics - Crohn's disease (CD) is a chronic inflammatory bowel disease exhibiting substantial heterogeneity in clinical presentation and response to therapy. To explore its molecular basis, we developed IBDv...

item.title: Cross-trait mapping of shared susceptibility across inflammatory bowel disease and spondyloarthropathies.
item.description: Journal of translational medicine - Inflammatory bowel diseases (IBDs) and spondyloarthropathies (SpAs) frequently co-occur, yet the subtype-specific genetic architecture and effector tissues that implement this gut-joint coupling re...

item.title: Glycoproteomic and genetic analysis of N-glycosylation of complement component C3 reveals immune pathway regulation.
item.description: Genome biology - Post-translational modifications represent a critical layer of protein regulation, yet their genetic control and population variation remain poorly characterized. Here we present a comprehensive an...

item.title: Multi-Cohort Transcriptomics Combined with Mendelian Randomization Identifies PPARGC1A, NAAA and GIPC2 as NLRP3 Inflammasome-Related Key Genes in Ulcerative Colitis.
item.description: Journal of inflammation research - Ulcerative Colitis (UC), a subtype of inflammatory bowel disease with unclear specific pathogenesis, was associated with recurrent inflammatory infections, genetics, and immunodeficiency. This stud...

item.title: Metabolic Profiling of Panax notoginseng Saponins in Rat Feces Under Colitis by UHPLC-QTOF-MS/MS.
item.description: Journal of separation science - The biotransformation of Panax notoginseng saponins (PNS) is pertinent to the effect of colitis mediated by gut microbiota, which has variant microbes and diversities in inflammatory bowel diseases...
